queries.description: Total payments and volume by currency
queries.sql: SELECT currency, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_amount FROM payments GROUP BY currency ORDER BY total_amount DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(charge_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount FROM payments WHERE charge_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
SELECT source, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_amount FROM payments GROUP BY source ORDER BY payment_count DESC
SELECT scheme, COUNT(*) AS mandate_count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mandates), 2) AS pct FROM mandates GROUP BY scheme ORDER BY mandate_count DESC

queries.description: Organisation sectors (parent_vertical) by number of mandates and total payment volume
queries.sql: SELECT o.parent_vertical, COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS mandate_count, COUNT(p.id) AS payment_count, ROUND(SUM(p.amount), 2) AS total_amount FROM organisations o LEFT JOIN mandates m ON m.organisation_id = o.id LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.mandate_id = m.id GROUP BY o.parent_vertical ORDER BY total_amount DESC

queries.description: Top 10 organisations by total payment volume
queries.sql: SELECT o.id, o.parent_vertical, COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS mandates, COUNT(p.id) AS payments, ROUND(SUM(p.amount), 2) AS total_amount FROM organisations o JOIN mandates m ON m.organisation_id = o.id JOIN payments p ON p.mandate_id = m.id GROUP BY o.id, o.parent_vertical ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 10

queries.description: Average days between payment creation and charge date
queries.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF(charge_date, created_at)), 1) AS avg_days_to_charge, MIN(DATEDIFF(charge_date, created_at)) AS min_days, MAX(DATEDIFF(charge_date, created_at)) AS max_days FROM payments WHERE charge_date IS NOT NULL AND created_at IS NOT NULL
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS new_mandates FROM mandates WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
